response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior developer with strong fundamentals in testing, multiple languages, and full-stack work, but lacks the core mandatory requirements: substantial recent C++ experience on Windows, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge. The only C/C++ experience listed is from 2014-2015 at National Instruments (~6 months), which is over a decade old and does not meet the 5-10 years of hands-on C++ requirement. No financial services or capital markets background is evident.
strengths: Solid senior-level engineering experience with TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship practices
Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, DLang, Java, Node.js) suggesting fast ramp-up ability
Demonstrated communication skills via workshops, talks, and teaching engagements
concerns: Minimal and outdated C++ experience (~6 months at NI in 2014-2015), far short of the 5-10 years required
No Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking domain experience
No demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle expertise; primary databases are MongoDB and MySQL

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general engineering seniority and craftsmanship
